case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. AMC EXPRESS INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 67183223) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
